hero.subhead: Senior cloud and CPaaS engineering for enterprises that can't afford to fail.

outcomes.uptimeContext: Hybrid GCP + AWS architecture, Renault Group

services.p1Body: AWS (expert), GCP, Azure. Hybrid topologies, IaC with Terraform, cost & security audits, well-architected reviews.
services.p2Body: Amazon Connect migrations, IVR design, Pinpoint & End-User Messaging.
services.p3Body: Lambda (Node, Python, Java), SNS/SQS, API Gateway, DynamoDB. Decoupled microservices that scale to billions.

servicesPage.subhead: Pick the shape of engagement that fits the work; the standard of delivery doesn't change.
servicesPage.sowBody: Scoped delivery against a defined Statement of Work. Fixed price, fixed timeline, agreed deliverables. Best when the outcome is well understood and the work can be priced up front.
servicesPage.retainerBody: Monthly capacity for advisory or steady delivery. Predictable spend, reserved bandwidth, advisory access between active projects. Best when the road ahead is multi-quarter and priorities will shift.
servicesPage.embeddedBody: Senior architect operating inside the client's team for the duration of the engagement. Full integration with internal rituals, code review, and on-call rotation. Best when ramp-up time matters.
servicesPage.step1Body: A 30-minute call to understand the problem, the team, the constraints, and whether an engagement is the right answer. No commitment on either side.
servicesPage.step2Body: A short written scope: outcomes, boundaries, assumptions, and the engagement model that fits. Reviewed together so there are no surprises later.
servicesPage.step3Body: Master Services Agreement plus a per-engagement Statement of Work. Plain language, signed by both sides. Insurance and confidentiality covered up front.
servicesPage.step4Body: Working session to align on milestones, communication cadence, access, and decision rights. The team meets the architect; questions get answered before code.
servicesPage.step5Body: Iterative delivery against the agreed scope. Weekly written status, demos at milestone gates, async-first communication. Changes go through a light scope-change protocol.
servicesPage.step6Body: Documentation, architecture decision records, and a knowledge-transfer session with the team that will own the work. Optional retainer follows for steady-state support.
servicesPage.bringItem1: Senior expertise: 10+ years architecting and shipping production cloud systems.
servicesPage.bringItem2: Our own equipment, tooling, and remote-work setup.
servicesPage.bringItem4: Written contracts: MSA and SOW for every engagement.
servicesPage.bringItem5: Multi-client perspective informed by enterprise and mid-market work.
servicesPage.bringItem6: Direct line to the architect on the engagement, never a layer of account management.

aboutPage.subhead: Saïd Aïssani, CEO of Unbounded Technologies Inc. Toronto, Ontario.
aboutPage.storyPara1: I'm Saïd Aïssani. I've spent the last ten years architecting and shipping cloud systems for enterprises that can't afford to fail. The work has run from greenfield serverless platforms at AWS Toronto, to a Forex referential at Renault Group serving over four billion API calls a month, to a two-year engagement with Bank of Montreal on cloud infrastructure. Earlier engagements include Melty (a 5.6M EUR media platform) and ETBA Construction, where an ERP modernization cut procurement time by 35 percent.
aboutPage.storyPara2: Unbounded Technologies Inc. exists so that work happens through one professional structure. A Canadian incorporated firm, written contracts, real insurance, and a senior architect on the other side of the table. No staffing-agency layers, no role ambiguity, no hidden costs. The point is to make senior cloud and CPaaS engineering available to the kind of clients who buy it the way they buy any other engineering service: scoped, signed, insured, and accountable.
aboutPage.op1: Unbounded Technologies Inc. is a Canadian incorporated engineering firm (Ontario).
aboutPage.op2: We operate with multiple concurrent enterprise clients including AWS, Renault Group, and Bank of Montreal.
aboutPage.op3: Engagements are governed by Master Service Agreement plus per-project Statement of Work.
aboutPage.op4: We carry $2M Errors & Omissions and $5M General Liability insurance.
aboutPage.op5: We provide our own equipment, tools, and software licenses.
aboutPage.op6: Languages of work: English, French (Native), Spanish, Arabic.

privacyPage.subhead: How Unbounded Technologies Inc. handles personal information collected through this site. Plain language, no surprises.
privacyPage.s1Body: Unbounded Technologies Inc. is a Canadian engineering firm incorporated in Ontario. Our registered office is in Toronto, Ontario, Canada. You can reach us at contact@unboundedtechnologies.com for any question about this policy or about how we handle your information.
privacyPage.s2Body:
We collect the information you submit through the project inquiry form on /contact: name, email address, company, industry, project type, budget range, timeline, and an optional free-text description of your project.

In addition, our hosting and anti-abuse providers automatically receive limited technical information when you visit the site: HTTP request logs, IP address (used short-term for rate limiting and abuse prevention), user-agent string, and a Cloudflare Turnstile challenge token used to verify that a form submission is human and not an automated script.
privacyPage.s3Body: We use the information you submit through the inquiry form for one purpose: to evaluate, qualify, and respond to your project inquiry. Technical telemetry (request logs, Turnstile verification) is used to keep the site available, prevent abuse, and protect the form against automated submissions. We do not use any of this information for advertising or for sale to third parties.
privacyPage.s4Body:
Inquiry submissions that do not lead to an engagement are retained for up to 24 months, after which they are deleted from our CRM and from any active mailbox.

If an inquiry leads to a signed engagement, the underlying records are retained for 7 years from the end of the engagement, in line with professional record-keeping practice and Canadian tax / liability requirements. Technical request logs at our hosting provider are retained according to that provider's standard log-retention window (currently a matter of days, not months).
privacyPage.s5Body:
Inquiry data is stored in our internal CRM (Notion), email is delivered through Resend, the site itself is hosted on Vercel, and the contact form is protected against bots by Cloudflare Turnstile. These providers act as our subprocessors and operate under their own published security and privacy commitments.

Some of these providers may store data outside Canada (typically in the United States). By submitting the contact form you acknowledge that this cross-border processing may occur.
privacyPage.s6Body:
Under the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) and applicable Ontario law, you have the right to ask what personal information we hold about you, to request that we correct it if it is inaccurate, and to request that we delete it.

To exercise any of these rights, email contact@unboundedtechnologies.com from the address you used to contact us. We respond within 30 days. If you are not satisfied with our response, you may contact the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada.
privacyPage.s7Body: We keep tracking minimal. The site uses Vercel's pseudonymous analytics (no personally identifying cookies, no cross-site tracking, no advertising IDs). We do not use third-party advertising cookies. We do not use marketing pixels or session-replay tools. We do not sell or share data with advertising networks.
privacyPage.s8Body: This site is intended for business audiences. It is not directed at children under the age of 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has submitted information through the form, contact us and we will delete it.
privacyPage.s9Body: We may update this policy as the site evolves or as legal requirements change. The current version is identified by the effective date at the top of this page. Material changes will be flagged on the site for a reasonable period before they take effect.
privacyPage.s10Body:
Questions, access requests, or deletion requests can be sent to contact@unboundedtechnologies.com.

Mailing address: Unbounded Technologies Inc., Toronto, Ontario, Canada (street address on request).

termsPage.subhead: Terms governing use of the unboundedtechnologies.com marketing site. Engagements proper are governed separately.
termsPage.s1Body: By accessing or using unboundedtechnologies.com (the site) you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the site. These terms apply to public visitors of the site, not to clients under a signed engagement: client work is governed by the documents listed in the next section.
termsPage.s2Body:
This is the marketing site of Unbounded Technologies Inc. It exists to describe the firm, present selected work, and let prospective clients open a conversation through the inquiry form on /contact.

Nothing on this site constitutes a service contract or a binding offer of services. Engagements are governed by a separate Master Service Agreement and a per-project Statement of Work signed by both parties. Until those documents are signed, no engagement exists.
termsPage.s3Body: You agree not to: scrape, crawl, or harvest content from the site outside of normal browser use; submit the inquiry form using automated tools or false identities; attempt to bypass the Turnstile bot-verification check; probe, scan, or test the vulnerability of the site without prior written permission; impersonate Unbounded Technologies Inc. or any of its clients; reproduce site content or client logos in a way that suggests endorsement we have not granted.
termsPage.s4Body: The site, its layout, copy, code, and original visual elements are the property of Unbounded Technologies Inc. or are used under license. Client names, logos, and case studies appear with the relevant party's permission or in a context that we believe constitutes fair use as professional reference. Nothing on this site grants you a license to reuse our materials beyond ordinary browsing and quotation.
termsPage.s5Body:
The site is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis without warranty of any kind, express or implied, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

To the maximum extent permitted by Ontario law, Unbounded Technologies Inc. is not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the site, including lost profits or business interruption, even if advised of the possibility of such damages. Liability for any direct damages is limited to the greater of one hundred Canadian dollars or the amount paid by you to access the site (which, for a public marketing site, is zero).
termsPage.s6Body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Province of Ontario and the federal laws of Canada applicable in Ontario, without regard to conflict-of-laws principles. Any dispute arising from these terms or from use of the site is subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Ontario, sitting in Toronto.
termsPage.s7Body: We may update these terms as the site or our practices evolve. The current version is identified by the effective date at the top of this page. Continued use of the site after a change takes effect means you accept the updated terms.
termsPage.s8Body: Questions about these terms can be sent to contact@unboundedtechnologies.com.

palette.label: Command Menu
palette.themeAutoDesc: Cinematic at night, Dark by day

contactPage.intro: Share a few details about your project. We respond within one business day. Strong matches can book a call directly on the next screen.

form.descriptionLabel: Briefly, what are you trying to solve?
form.descriptionPlaceholder: A few lines is plenty - the constraint, the goal, anything we should know.
form.replyTime: We respond within one business day
form.errorTurnstile: Anti-bot check did not pass. Please reload and try again.
form.errorRateLimit: Too many submissions. Please try again in an hour.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong sending the form. Please try again or email contact@unboundedtechnologies.com directly.

thankYou.qualifiedHeadline: Thank you. We are excited to talk.
thankYou.qualifiedBody: Your project lines up well with what we do best. Pick a 30-minute slot below and you will receive a calendar invite by email right away.
thankYou.exploratoryBody: We have your note and will reply by email within a few business days. If anything changes in the meantime, write to contact@unboundedtechnologies.com.

og.home: Cloud at the scale of trust.
og.about: Senior cloud architecture, built to last.

notFound.headlineTrail: But not in the way we meant.
notFound.body: The link is wrong, the page moved, or it never existed in the first place. Pick a destination below or jump anywhere with the command palette.
